commands.review_summary:
Adds an unreleased changelog entry for the Web Push VAPID default subject fix and refreshes the generated config baseline hash file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes the changelog and a generated baseline hash, not runtime behavior. The underlying VAPID behavior is already visible in current source and focused tests.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review/merge handling for a protected, clean documentation follow-up PR.

target.title: docs(changelog): note VAPID subject fix
target.body:
## Summary

- Add the missing `CHANGELOG.md` entry for the already-merged Web Push VAPID default fix from #83317.
- Note that generated VAPID keys now default to `https://openclaw.ai` when `OPENCLAW_VAPID_SUBJECT` is unset, avoiding the old localhost mailbox subject rejected by Apple Web Push.
- Refresh the generated config docs baseline hash to the CI/Testbox Node 24 output so the release-metadata changed gate stays green.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [x] Chore/infra

## Scope

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [x] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Follows #83317
- References #83134
- [x] This PR documents a landed bug fix

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: release notes now mention the already-landed Control UI/Web Push VAPID default fix so operators see the iOS PWA push setup change in the changelog.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout for the focused VAPID proof and review; Crabbox fresh PR checkout for the full changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/push-web.test.ts
codex review --base origin/main
pnpm check:changed
```

Evidence after fix: `git diff --check` is clean; `src/infra/push-web.test.ts` passes 13/13; local Codex review reported no actionable correctness issues; Crabbox fresh PR run `run_f01fd9fd7b39` on lease `cbx_207e385c36a0` passed `pnpm check:changed`.

Observed result after fix: `CHANGELOG.md` includes a single unreleased fix entry for #83134 / #83317 with contributor credit, and `docs/.generated/config-baseline.sha256` validates on the Node 24 check environment.

What was not tested: live Apple Web Push delivery was not re-run here; #83317 already covered the code/docs change and this PR only adds the release note plus generated baseline hash refresh.

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` — pass
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/push-web.test.ts` — 13/13 pass
- `codex review --base origin/main` — no actionable findings
- Crabbox fresh PR `run_f01fd9fd7b39` / `cbx_207e385c36a0`: `pnpm check:changed` — pass

## Notes

Blacksmith Testbox sync produced invalid sparse/mass-delete remote worktrees for this branch, so the final changed gate used a Crabbox fresh PR checkout instead.
